# Data migration

* As a user I want to be able to migrate data from 6.15 to 7.0 (w/ system dumps)
* As a user I want to be able to know what is the version of a system dump (and not the XP version it was generated by)
* As a user I want my dumps to be automatically upgraded before being loaded if necessary

## Requirements

* A dump model version property must be included in the dump.json
* The dump upgrade must be done server side
* If the version to be loaded is incompatible, the dump load should update the dump first.

## Dependencies

None

## Details

### Versioning

Supposition: We use a pattern X.Y for the versioning of data and dumps.
* X is incremented on breaking changes.
* Y is incremented on non breaking changes (extension of the schema).
* The specifications of the data/dumps would be defined by this X.Y version.
* To be able to upgrade the data/dump on demand, we need to store this information.
Only the major version is necessary for the upgrade since a data/dump X1 is supposed to be compatible with all the subsequent X1.* versions.
But minor version would be helpful to check that you are not trying to load a subsequent version of data that is not handled by the current version.
